projects.name: Hero's AI
features: Multi-Model AI with Automatic Fallback Chain
Adaptive Token Budgeting per Task Type
projects.overview: Hero's AI is a production-grade, full-stack intelligent assistant platform built with Python and Django. It orchestrates multiple LLM providers — Google Gemini, OpenRouter, and Groq — through an automatic waterfall fallback engine called Baymax, ensuring near-zero downtime. The platform supports text chat, coding, voice conversation, real-time web search, document analysis, and RAG-powered data analytics via its Infinsight sub-module.
projects.simple_explanation: An all-in-one AI assistant where users can chat, write and debug code, search the web, upload documents, and analyze data files — all with the reliability of multiple AI models backing each other up.
projects.problem_solved: Single-model AI apps break when quotas run out. Hero's AI solves this with a multi-model waterfall fallback (Gemini → OpenRouter → Groq), while NLP-based routing ensures every task — coding, search, analytics, voice — is handled by the most suitable model and prompt. Sensitive API keys are encrypted server-side, and data analysis is made accessible to non-coders through plain English queries.

core_engine.name: Baymax
core_engine.description: The central AI orchestrator class that detects task intent via NLP, routes messages to purpose-built handlers, calls the primary model, and automatically falls back through OpenRouter (6 free models) and Groq (4 models) if the primary fails.

projects.name: Infinsight
features: Natural Language Querying over CSV, Excel, and PDF files
RAG Pipeline with Pinecone Vector Storage
Live Pandas Code Generation & Sandboxed Execution
projects.overview: Infinsight is an advanced RAG-powered data analytics sub-module inside Hero's AI. It allows users to upload structured data files and query them using plain English — no coding required. The system parses, embeds, indexes, retrieves, and executes live Pandas code to produce analyst-grade reports.
projects.simple_explanation: Upload a CSV, Excel, or PDF file and ask questions like 'What is the monthly revenue trend?' or 'Who are the top customers?' — Infinsight runs the analysis and returns a clean, readable report.
projects.problem_solved: Data analysis traditionally requires Python, SQL, or Excel expertise. Infinsight removes that barrier entirely by letting users ask natural language questions. The AI generates and executes Pandas code behind the scenes and delivers a complete analyst report.
how_it_works: User uploads a CSV, Excel, or PDF file
File is parsed into text chunks (CSV rows → summaries, PDFs → page-level chunks)
Chunks are embedded using gemini-embedding-001 and stored in Pinecone under a user-specific namespace
User submits a natural language query
Relevant chunks are retrieved via semantic similarity search
Retrieved context + dataset schema are passed to Gemini
If computation is needed, Gemini generates Python/Pandas code
Code is executed safely in a sandboxed asteval interpreter
Gemini interprets the output into a final human-readable analyst report
